mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.title as content_title, a.last_listen_dtime, e.album_img_size as size, CONCAT(e.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(e.update_dtime)) AS url, b.album_id, b.title, b.release_ymd, IF(b.album_tp='MF', '', b.album_tp) album_type, d.artist_id albumArtistId, d.artist_nm albumArtistName, h.artist_id albumRepArtistId, h.artist_nm albumRepArtistName FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 1000 ) a JOIN ted_album b ON a.listen_type_id = b.album_id AND listen_type = 'ALBUM' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_albumartist c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img e ON b.album_id = e.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_albumstyle f ON b.album_id = f.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_style g ON f.style_id = g.style_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist h ON h.artist_id = b.artist_id ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC
